name: Pouf Earl Faux Leather French Seam Ottoman Caramel - Threshold™: Modern Square Footstool, No Assembly Required
description:
Put an extra seating option in your lounge area with this Earl Faux-Leather French Seam Ottoman from Threshold™. Upholstered in faux-leather for hassle-free maintenance, this upholstered pouf ottoman is stuffed with super-soft foam filling for extra comfort and support. The solid brown color easily blends with your existing furniture, while the French seams on the sides create a more elegant look. Use it as a footstool, an extra seat or a decorative accent.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
